name: Total GHG emissions (Scope 1+2)
description: Scope 1+2 total emissions for reporting period
protocol_notes: From MRV activity data + emission factors

name: Energy intensity
protocol_notes: Sum energy carriers converted to kWh

name: Waste generation intensity
protocol_notes: Waste generated normalized by output quantity

name: Waste recovery rate
description: Recovered waste as % of waste generated

name: Transport GHG emissions intensity
description: Transport-related GHG emissions per functional unit
protocol_notes: Direct transport emissions or factor-based emissions from tkm/diesel normalized by output

name: Circularity ratio
description: Circular material share of total materials

name: Energy cost share
description: Energy costs as % of operating cost

name: Maintenance cost per operating hour
description: Maintenance cost normalized by operating hours

name: Logistics cost per tkm
description: Logistics cost normalized by transport work

name: Service level
description: Percentage of demand/orders fulfilled at required level
protocol_notes: Direct service level/fill rate or fulfilled over total

name: Average lead time
description: Average lead time per order or shipment
protocol_notes: Direct average lead time or total lead time divided by orders/shipments
